task: Define observability UI API response contracts
acceptance_criteria: Summary aggregate row detail and calibration-readiness responses are explicit and aligned with the ADR
validation_command: uv run --project finance-agent-core python -m ruff check finance-agent-core/src/agents/technical/subdomains/decision_observability
notes: Post-review remediation added explicit event-detail contracts and completed calibration-readiness response modeling without forcing observation payloads by default.

task: Implement FastAPI routes backed by decision_observability runtime
acceptance_criteria: Dedicated internal observability routes exist without exposing repository internals
validation_command: uv run --project finance-agent-core python -m pytest finance-agent-core/tests -q
notes: Routes now cover aggregates, rows, event detail, and calibration readiness. Query parameters were widened to align with MonitoringQueryScope instead of a narrower temporary surface.

task: Add focused backend tests for route contracts and degraded cases
acceptance_criteria: Observability UI routes have focused tests for success empty and error-safe response paths
validation_command: uv run --project finance-agent-core python -m pytest finance-agent-core/tests -q
notes: Focused API tests now cover scope extraction, event detail success, missing-event 404, empty row responses, and limit normalization.

task: Regenerate and verify frontend API contract sync target
acceptance_criteria: OpenAPI and generated frontend contract are compatible with the new observability routes
validation_command: uv run --project finance-agent-core python -m pytest finance-agent-core/tests -q && cd frontend && npm run typecheck
notes: Regenerated OpenAPI and frontend generated contract after the post-review API changes, then verified frontend typecheck against the new schema.
